ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Ensures the plugin focuses automatically on directory of newly opened files, if they are not visible right now
ast.target: 确保插件自动聚焦于新打开文件的目录，如果它们当前不可见的话

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Focus on the first folder from root if the auto focus setting is enabled
ast.target: 如果启用了自动聚焦设置，则聚焦于根目录下的第一个文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Always auto-focus on the parent directory of current file, even if it is already visible
ast.target: 始终自动聚焦于当前文件的父目录，即使它已经可见

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hide parent directories when focusing on a folder (saves space when using nested folders)
ast.target: 聚焦于文件夹时隐藏父目录（在使用嵌套文件夹时节省空间）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add a button on the top of the file explorer
ast.target: 在文件资源管理器顶部添加一个按钮

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show "Focus on this file" option in file context menu
ast.target: 在文件上下文菜单中显示“聚焦于此文件”选项

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Focus on the folder linked with the folder note
ast.target: 聚焦于与文件夹笔记关联的文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 强制自动聚焦于父目录

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show focus option on file context menu
ast.target: 在文件上下文菜单中显示聚焦选项

ast.name: name
ast.source: Enable folder focus mode for active file
ast.target: 为活动文件启用文件夹焦点模式
